consumer_accept_list.description: Defines the list of CIDR ranges that are allowed to access the Apigee instance, ensuring secure connectivity.

description.description: Defines the description of the Apigee instance, providing context or purpose for the instance; must not exceed 255 characters.

disk_encryption_key_name.description: Specifies the name of the customer-managed encryption key (CMEK) used to encrypt the disk, requiring the key to exist in Cloud KMS within the same project and region as the instance.

display_name.description: Defines the user-friendly name for the Apigee instance, which must be unique within the organization and adhere to naming conventions.

ip_range.description: Specifies the CIDR block for the instance's private IP range. Must be a /22 block within an RFC 1918 address range and cannot overlap with existing networks.

location.description: Specifies the Compute Engine region where the Apigee instance will be created; must match the region of associated network resources.

name.description: Specifies the unique name of the Apigee instance, adhering to naming conventions and constraints.

org_id.description: Specifies the Apigee organization ID to associate with the instance; must be an existing organization.

peering_cidr_range.description: Specifies the CIDR range for the peering network, must be a /16 range and cannot overlap with existing subnets in the network.

timeouts.description: Defines the custom timeout settings for creating, updating, and deleting the Apigee instance.
